claims: The skill is granted permission to run any gcloud command (Bash(gcloud:*)), which is not limited to Vertex AI endpoint configuration tasks and could be used to access or modify unrelated GCP resources (e.g., Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, BigQuery), exceeding the stated purpose of providing assistance specifically for Vertex AI endpoint config. This violates the principle of least privilege and data minimization.
